tasks.description: 1.1 Initialize Astro + React project structure (if not already done)
1.2 Set up Supabase client in the project
1.3 Configure environment variables for Supabase (URL, Anon Key)
1.4 Setup routing structure for main pages (Home, Products, Cart, Checkout, Login, Admin)
2.1 Create `users` table/logic extending Supabase Auth (roles: admin/user)
2.2 Create `products` table (id, name, description, price, inventory, image_url)
2.3 Create `orders` and `order_items` tables
2.4 Create `reviews` table
2.5 Implement Row Level Security (RLS) policies for all tables (Admins: all access, Users: read products, read/write own orders/reviews)
3.1 Build Login and Registration UI components
3.2 Implement Supabase Auth integration for sign in/up/out
3.3 Create a protected route higher-order component or middleware to restrict pages based on auth state and role
4.1 Build Admin interface to add, edit (price), and delete products
4.2 Build public Product Listing page with filtering capabilities
4.3 Build public Product Details page
5.1 Implement global state management for the Cart (Zustand or React Context)
5.2 Build "Add to Cart" functionality on product pages
5.3 Build the Cart UI (drawer or dedicated page) to view, update quantities, and remove items
5.4 Calculate and display subtotal and totals
6.1 Build Checkout form to capture shipping and billing details
6.2 Integrate payment gateway mock or real provider (e.g., Stripe)
6.3 Implement logic to save the order to Supabase upon successful payment and clear the cart
7.1 Build User Profile page to display past orders
7.2 Implement "Write a Review" form on the Product Details page for authenticated users
7.3 Display product reviews and calculate average rating

instruction:
Read context files, work through pending tasks, mark complete as you go.
Pause if you hit blockers or need clarification.
